title: Internal latency: DB pool contention from a slow query (in-lane)
user:
get_metrics order-service http_request_duration_p99 -20m step=2m:
14:00 78ms  14:04 82ms  14:08 240ms  14:12 610ms  14:16 1400ms  14:20 1900ms

get_metrics order-service pool_waiters -20m step=2m:
14:00 0  14:04 0  14:08 2  14:12 9  14:16 18  14:20 26

get_metrics order-service http_requests_total -20m step=2m (req/s):
14:00 520  14:08 530  14:12 525  14:20 515

get_metrics payment-service http_request_duration_p99 -20m step=2m:
14:00 121ms  14:08 119ms  14:16 123ms  14:20 120ms

read_logs order-service -5m filter=slow_query:
14:19:51 WARN slow_query schema=orders dur_ms=1820 plan=seqscan rows=2.1M predicate="status='PENDING_PAYMENT'"

Extract the order-service signal(s).

title: Outbound-vs-internal discriminator: order-service p99 tracking payment-service
user:
get_metrics order-service http_request_duration_p99 -15m step=1m:
14:30 79ms  14:33 410ms  14:36 1600ms  14:39 2100ms

get_metrics payment-service http_request_duration_p99 -15m step=1m:
14:30 130ms  14:33 380ms  14:36 1500ms  14:39 2050ms

get_metrics order-service pool_waiters -15m step=1m:
14:30 0  14:33 0  14:36 1  14:39 1

get_metrics order-service gc_pause_ms -15m step=1m:
14:30 9  14:33 11  14:36 8  14:39 10

read_logs order-service -5m filter=payment:
14:38:40 INFO order=k01 state=PENDING_PAYMENT awaiting payment-service
14:38:43 WARN order=k02 payment_call_ms=3001 state=PENDING_PAYMENT

Extract the order-service signal(s).

title: Lifecycle stall: orders accumulating in PENDING_PAYMENT (orders query)
user:
query_sql orders:
SELECT status, count(*), max(now() - updated_at) AS oldest
FROM orders WHERE updated_at > now() - interval '30 min' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;

 status          | count | oldest
-----------------+-------+----------
 PENDING_PAYMENT |   842 | 00:14:32
 PAID            |   210 | 00:00:03
 FULFILLED       |   198 | 00:00:30
 STOCK_RESERVED  |    45 | 00:00:11

Extract the order-service signal(s).

title: Scope trap: order-service clean, foreign Redis/inventory signals present
user:
The orchestrator handed you this mixed evidence bundle while investigating a checkout incident. Some of it may not concern order-service.

get_metrics order-service http_request_duration_p99 -10m step=2m:
14:30 80ms  14:32 82ms  14:34 79ms  14:36 81ms  14:38 80ms

get_metrics order-service pool_waiters -10m step=2m:
14:30 0  14:32 0  14:34 1  14:36 0  14:38 0

get_metrics redis redis_command_latency_p99 -10m step=2m:
14:30 0.4ms  14:32 0.4ms  14:34 35ms  14:36 39ms  14:38 44ms

read_logs inventory-service -10m filter=cache:
14:35:02 WARN redis_timeout falling_back_to_postgres sku=AB12
14:35:09 WARN redis_timeout falling_back_to_postgres sku=CD34

Extract the order-service signal(s).

title: Nominal order-service with a benign cancellation (do not fabricate a finding)
user:
read_logs order-service -15m filter=state:
14:10:11 INFO order=m01 CREATED->STOCK_RESERVED->PENDING_PAYMENT->PAID->FULFILLED
14:10:30 INFO order=m02 CREATED->CANCELLED reason=customer_abort
14:10:41 INFO order=m03 CREATED->STOCK_RESERVED->PENDING_PAYMENT->PAID

get_metrics order-service http_request_duration_p99 -15m step=3m: 78 80 81 79 80
get_metrics order-service error_rate -15m step=3m: 0.001 0.001 0.002 0.001 0.001

Extract the order-service signal(s).
